name: Caramel Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3 Squares unsweetened chocolate, melted (1 oz each)
12 oz Semisweet chocolate chips, about 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop walnuts. Measure out 1 cup and set aside.
2. Finely chop the remaining walnuts.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a medium bowl, beat together 1 stick butter, sugar, eggs, and vanilla with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy, about 2-3 minutes.
5. Beat in melted chocolate.
6. Add 2/3 cup flour and beat until well blended.
7. Stir in finely chopped nuts.
8. Spread batter evenly in a greased, foil-lined 9x13-inch baking pan.
9. Bake for 10 minutes.
10. In a small bowl, mix together caramel and remaining 1/4 cup flour until blended.
11. Drizzle over partially baked brownies.
12. Sprinkle coarsely chopped nuts over top.
13. Return to oven and bake 20 minutes longer, or until bubbly.
14. Meanwhile, in a 1-quart glass bowl, heat chocolate chips with cream and remaining tablespoon butter in a microwave oven on High for 1-1/4 to 1-3/4 minutes, or until smooth when stirred.
15. Set glaze aside.
16. Let brownies cool for 15 minutes.
17. Spread glaze over brownies.
18. Sprinkle coconut on top.
19. Refrigerate for 1 hour, until glaze is set.
20. Carefully cut into 36 (1-1/2 x 2-1/8-inch) bars. Return to refrigerator until serving time.
